title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Frontend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
